HomePage.title: Quick Exam Gen!
HomePage.heroTitle: Turn any document into exam-ready questions
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Upload a PDF or Word file, let AI extract the key concepts, and get a full question bank with multiple variants — in under 60 seconds.
HomePage.useCasesSubtitle: Whether you teach a class of 30 or train a team of 3,000, we've got you covered.

useCases.title: Teachers & Educators
useCases.description: Turn your lecture notes or textbook chapters into polished, ready-to-print exams in seconds. Stop spending evenings writing questions by hand.

useCases.title: Schools & Institutions
useCases.description: Standardize exam quality across departments. Generate multiple variants of the same test to prevent cheating without extra effort.

useCases.title: Tutoring Centers
useCases.description: Create personalized practice sets for every student from a single source document. More practice, less prep time.

useCases.title: Self-Learners
useCases.description: Upload your study material and instantly get quiz questions to test yourself. Active recall made effortless.

useCases.title: Corporate Trainers
useCases.description: Convert training manuals and SOPs into assessment quizzes. Verify employee knowledge without hiring a content team.

useCases.title: Hackathon & Event Hosts
useCases.description: Need a trivia round or knowledge check in 5 minutes? Drop in any document and get a full question set instantly.

howItWorks.title: Upload your document
howItWorks.body: Drag-and-drop a PDF or Word file — lecture notes, textbooks, training manuals, anything.

howItWorks.title: AI extracts the knowledge
howItWorks.body: Our AI reads the content, identifies key concepts, and generates high-quality questions automatically.

howItWorks.title: Export & share instantly
howItWorks.body: Download a print-ready exam with multiple variants, or share a link with your students right away.

HomePage.testimonialsSubtitle: Thousands of teachers, trainers, and learners save hours every week with Quick Exam Gen.

testimonials.name: Nguyen Thi Lan
testimonials.quote: I used to spend 3-4 hours writing each exam. Now I upload my chapter notes and have a full question bank in under a minute. The quality genuinely surprised me.

testimonials.name: Marcus Webb
testimonials.quote: We rolled out 12 compliance quizzes last quarter using Quick Exam Gen. Our team saved roughly 40 hours of content work. I don't know why we didn't find this sooner.

testimonials.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
testimonials.quote: Generating exam variants is a game-changer for large cohorts. Each student gets a slightly different paper but the same learning objectives. Zero extra effort on my end.

testimonials.name: Tomás Reyes
testimonials.quote: Our tutors use it daily to build practice sets for students. The drag-and-drop upload is fast, the questions are accurate, and the export is clean. Solid product.

testimonials.name: Aiko Tanaka
testimonials.quote: I coach students for national entrance exams. Being able to generate hundreds of practice questions from past papers in minutes is absolutely invaluable.

testimonials.name: Emily Chen
testimonials.quote: I upload my lecture slides and get a self-quiz instantly. It helped me actually retain information instead of just re-reading the same slides over and over.

HomePage.finalCtaTitle: Ready to save hours every week?
HomePage.finalCtaSubtitle: Join thousands of educators who've ditched manual exam writing. Your first exam is free — no credit card required.
HomePage.noCreditCard: No credit card required · Cancel anytime

Metadata.title: Quick Exam Gen - Easy Online Exam Creation
Metadata.description: Quick Exam Gen is an online exam creation tool that helps teachers and students create high-quality exams quickly and easily.
